versions.version_description: This specific tab is based off the studio recorded version.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
I want you to stay[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Bm7[/ch]    [ch]Bm9[/ch]
'Til I'm in the grave[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em7[/ch]              [ch]Em6[/ch]
'Til I rot away, dead and buried[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]A7sus2[/ch]        [ch]A7[/ch]
'Til I'm in the casket you carry[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
If you go, I'm goin' too[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Bm7[/ch]    [ch]Bm9[/ch]
'Cause it was always you[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em7[/ch]                 [ch]Em6[/ch]
And if I'm turnin' blue, please don't save me[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]A7sus2[/ch]          [ch]A7[/ch]
Nothin' left to lose without my baby[/tab]


[Refrain]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]                             [ch]Bm7[/ch]
 Birds of a feather, we should stick together, I know[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Bm9[/ch]
I said I'd never think I wasn't better alone[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                         [ch]Em6[/ch]
  Can't change the weather, might not be forever[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A7sus2[/ch]                  [ch]A7[/ch]
But if it's forever, it's even better[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]               [ch]Bm7[/ch]
 And I don't know what I'm cryin' for[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bm9[/ch]               [ch]Em7[/ch]
I don't think I could love you more[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em6[/ch]                  [ch]A7sus2[/ch]
It might not be long, but, baby, I[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]A7[/ch]                           [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
I'll love you 'til the day that I die[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]Bm9[/ch]
'Til the day that I die[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]Em6[/ch]
'Til the light leaves my eyes[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]A7sus2[/ch]  [ch]A7[/ch]
'Til the day that I die[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
I want you to see[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]Bm9[/ch]
How you look to me[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]Em6[/ch]
You wouldn't believe if I told ya[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]A7sus2[/ch]         [ch]A7[/ch]
You would keep the compliments I throw ya[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
But you're so full of shit[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]Bm9[/ch]
Tell me it's a bit[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Em7[/ch]             [ch]Em6[/ch]
Say you don't see it, your mind's polluted[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A7sus2[/ch]         [ch]A7[/ch]
Say you wanna quit, don't be stupid[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]            [ch]Bm7[/ch]
 And I don't know what I'm cryin' for[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bm9[/ch]               [ch]Em7[/ch]
I don't think I could love you more[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em6[/ch]                  [ch]A7sus2[/ch]   [ch]A7[/ch]
It might not be long, but, baby, I[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch]
Don't wanna say goodbye[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                    [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]                         [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Birds of a feather, we should stick together, I know[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Bm9[/ch]                    [ch]Em7[/ch]
I said I'd never think I wasn't better alone[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Em6[/ch]
Can't change the weather, might not be forever[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A7sus2[/ch]           [ch]A7[/ch]
But if it's forever, it's even better[/tab]


[Post-Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]      [ch]Bm7[/ch]
 I knew you in another life[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bm9[/ch]               [ch]Em7[/ch]
You had that same look in your eyes[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em6[/ch]                [ch]A7sus2[/ch]    [ch]A7[/ch]
I love you, don't act so surprised[/tab]


[Outro]
[ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]Bm9[/ch]
[ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Em6[/ch] [ch]A7sus2[/ch] [ch]A7[/ch]
